message:

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-2020-working-group-add-sustainability-metrics-to-semantic-conventi",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry: Working Group: Add sustainability Metrics to Semantic Conventions",
+    "description": "Working Group: Add sustainability Metrics to Semantic Conventions. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nhelm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry\n```\nWith the introduction of various [European Laws regarding sustainability](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/policies/green-deal/fit-for-55-the-eu-plan-for-a-green-transition/), it is becoming increasingly more important for companies to track the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Working Group: Add sustainability Metrics to Semantic…",
+        "description": "This proposes a project and working group for establishing Semantic Conventions for sustainability. \n\nWe aim to unify and and establish standards for monitoring sustainability metrics\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Working Group: Add sustainability Metrics to Semantic…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This proposes a project and working group for establishing Semantic Conventions for sustainability. \n\nWe aim to unify and and establish standards for monitoring sustainability metrics",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
